mapper.sql: id, article_name, article_outline, story_background, image_desc, theme, additional_characteristics, voice_tone, voice_link, voice_file_path, video_link, video_file_path, publish_status, total_word_count_estimate, chapter_word_count_estimate, story_complete, res_state, create_user_id, response_id, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM article WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1

SELECT
FROM article WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} FOR UPDATE

SELECT
FROM article WHERE article_name = #{articleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND res_state = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article ( article_name, article_outline, story_background, image_desc, theme, additional_characteristics, voice_tone, voice_link, voice_file_path, video_link, video_file_path, publish_status, total_word_count_estimate, chapter_word_count_estimate, story_complete, response_id, res_state, create_user_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{articleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{articleOutline,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storyBackground,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{theme,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{additionalCharacteristics,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voiceTone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voiceLink,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voiceFilePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{videoLink,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{videoFilePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publishStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{totalWordCountEstimate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{chapterWordCountEstimate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{storyComplete,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{responseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT article_name FROM article WHERE theme = #{theme,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT article_name AS articleName, article_outline AS articleOutline FROM article WHERE theme = #{theme,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM article WHERE res_state = 1 ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT
FROM article a WHERE a.res_state = 1 AND a.total_word_count_estimate IS NOT NULL AND a.chapter_word_count_estimate IS NOT NULL AND a.total_word_count_estimate > 0 AND a.chapter_word_count_estimate > 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM article_chapter ac WHERE ac.article_id = a.id AND ac.res_state = 1 ) ORDER BY a.create_time ASC
SELECT article_name FROM article WHERE res_state = 1 AND theme = #{theme,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY create_time DESC
